body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/50138914?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/KKC73", "id": 50138914, "login": "KKC73", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUwMTM4OTE0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/KKC73", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40882", "cvss": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-611", "name": "Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference"}], "description": "### Summary The Velbus asset import path parses attacker-controlled XML without explicit XXE hardening. An authenticated user who can call the import endpoint may trigger XML external entity processing, which can lead to server-side file disclosure and SSRF. The target file must be less than 1023 characters. ### Details Velbus import uses `DocumentBuilderFactory.newInstance().newDocumentBuilder().parse(...)` on untrusted XML input, without explicit safeguards to disable DTD/external entities. ```154:165:agent/src/main/java/org/openremote/agent/protocol/velbus/AbstractVelbusProtocol.java @Override public Future startAssetImport(byte[] fileData, Consumer assetConsumer) { return executorService.submit(() -> { Document xmlDoc; try { String xmlStr = new String(fileData, StandardCharsets.UTF_8); LOG.info("Parsing VELBUS project file"); xmlDoc = DocumentBuilderFactory .newInstance() .newDocumentBuilder() .parse(new InputSource(new StringReader(xmlStr))); ``` Expanded `Caption` content is propagated into created asset names: ```193:198:agent/src/main/java/org/openremote/agent/protocol/velbus/AbstractVelbusProtocol.java String name = module.getElementsByTagName("Caption").item(0).getTextContent(); name = isNullOrEmpty(name) ? deviceType.toString() : name; // TODO: Use device specific asset types Asset device = new ThingAsset(name); ``` ### PoC 1. Log in to a realm with a user that can call Velbus asset import. 2. Create/select a Velbus TCP Agent in that same realm. 3. Send `POST /api/{realm}/agent/assetImport/{agentId}` with a Velbus project XML payload and compare behavior against a baseline import file. 3. Save the below code as a `xxe.xml` and upload to `Setup` under `https://localhost/manager/?realm=#/assets/false/`. Chnage the `file:///etc/passwd` to another file if your `passwd` is longer than 1023 characters. ```xml ]> &xxe; ``` As long as the file content is under 1023 characters, the exploit will succeed. If the file content reaches the limit, an error is thrown. ### Impact - **Type:** XML External Entity (XXE) - **Affected:** Deployments exposing Velbus import to authenticated users with import access - **Risk:** limited local file disclosure (as long as the file is under 1023 characters) from the Manager runtime, and SSRF.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00249, "percentile": 0.15913}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g24f-mgc3-jwwc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-15T19:42:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g24f-mgc3-jwwc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g24f-mgc3-jwwc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40882"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T21:17:08Z", "published_at": "2026-04-15T19:42:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openremote/openremote/security/advisories/GHSA-g24f-mgc3-jwwc", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40882", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g24f-mgc3-jwwc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openremote/openremote/security-advisories/GHSA-g24f-mgc3-jwwc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openremote/openremote", "summary": "OpenRemote has XXE in Velbus Asset Import", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:22:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g24f-mgc3-jwwc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.22.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.openremote:openremote-manager"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.21.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenRemote has XXE in Velbus Asset Import
